name: Raspberry Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together flour, sugar and salt. With a pastry blender or food processor, cut in butter until it resembles tiny peas.
2. In a small bowl, using a fork, stir together egg yolk, lemon juice and 1 tbsp water; sprinkle over flour mixture.
3. Stirring with a fork, add a little more water if necessary to hold the dough together. Using hands, gently shape the pastry into a ball.
4. Press the dough 1/8 inch thick into a flan pan. Refrigerate while making the filling.
5. Filling: Preheat the oven to 425°F. In a small saucepan, stir together water and cornstarch until smooth. Stir in sugar. Add raspberries and cook, stirring over medium-low heat for 10-15 minutes or until thickened. Let cool; spoon into shell, filling no more than 2/3 full.
6. Bake in the 425°F oven for 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to 350°F and bake 15 minutes longer or until pastry is golden brown. Let cool in a flan ring 15 minutes before removing to a rack.
